diagnostic.help: bind the variable to a consume or read input place
diagnostic.message: timer bind 'latch' on transition [on_tick] names place (refresh_due), but that place does not feed [on_tick] through a consume or read arc

source.text:
net cadence_tick_non_input_bind

(tick_latch) -tick_latch-> [on_tick] -tick_latch-> (tick_latch)
[on_tick] -refresh_due-> (refresh_due)
@tick_clock: (clock) -clock->? [on_tick]
[on_tick] handler "on_tick@cadence"
[on_tick] timer clock (clock) cel "clock.now >= latch.fired_at"
[on_tick] timer bind latch (refresh_due)
